title: Some Other Places of Pilgrimage on Venketachal Mountain

analysis.core_story_summary: All the sages then requested Sutji to tell about some other places of pilgrimage situated on Venketachal mountain. Sutji replied---There are about one hundred and eight holy places situated on Venketachal mountain. Among all these holy places, six are considered to be capable of bestowing salvation---Swami pushkarini, Akash ganga, Papvinashan, Panduteerth, Kumar dharika teerth and Tumbu teerth.

audience_notes.children_8_12: Use simple language, explain divine names as characters in a sacred legend.
audience_notes.teens_13_17: Connect events to decision-making, identity, and consequences.
audience_notes.young_adults_18_30: Highlight ethics, leadership, and social relevance.
audience_notes.devotional_traditional: Preserve sacred framing and theological terms respectfully.
audience_notes.global_general: Keep cultural context brief and avoid insider assumptions.

sensitivity_notes: Mostly suitable for broad audiences with light cultural context.

redesigned_story_by_demographic.children_8_12: **Some Other Places of Pilgrimage on Venketachal Mountain — Kids (8-12):** All the sages then requested Sutji to tell about some other places of pilgrimage situated on Venketachal mountain. Sutji replied---There are about one hundred and eight holy places situated on Venketachal mountain. Among all these holy places, six are considered to be capable of bestowing salvation---Swami pushkarini, Akash ganga, Papvinashan, Panduteerth, Kumar dharika teerth and Tumbu teerth. This story teaches actions have consequences, humility before higher wisdom. Think of it like a legend that helps us choose kindness, courage, and respect.
